rationale: Educ. Code §45.161 governs eminent domain authority for education facilities. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraisal values, or Tax Code §11.13, so no conflict arises.
quote: For the purpose of carrying out any power conferred by this subchapter, an authority may acquire the fee simple title to land and other property and easements by condemnation in the manner provided by Chapter 21, Property Code.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this eminent domain provision.
